sn17.3:1.0.2: Luddoti kho, bhikkhave, mārassetaṁ pāpimato adhivacanaṁ. Papatāti kho, bhikkhave, lābhasakkārasilokassetaṁ adhivacanaṁ. Suttakanti kho, bhikkhave, nandīrāgassetaṁ adhivacanaṁ. Yo hi koci, bhikkhave, bhikkhu uppannaṁ lābhasakkārasilokaṁ assādeti nikāmeti – ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, bhikkhu giddho papatāya anayaṁ āpanno byasanaṁ āpanno yathākāmakaraṇīyo pāpimato. Evaṁ dāruṇo kho, bhikkhave, lābhasakkārasiloko … pe … evañhi vo, bhikkhave, sikkhitabban"ti.
